title: Squirrel Removal in Boerum Hill, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Boerum Hill, Brooklyn. Humane extraction, entry sealing & prevention. Serving brownstones & historic homes. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Boerum Hill's beautiful tree-lined streets and historic brownstones provide an ideal environment for squirrels, but when they invade your attic or walls, they can cause serious damage. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services specifically designed for Boerum Hill's unique architectural landscape, from century-old townhouses to modern renovations. Our humane removal methods protect both your property and Brooklyn's urban wildlife.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in squirrel removal for Boerum Hill's historic properties, understanding the delicate balance between preservation and pest control. Our experienced technicians use proven humane methods and provide complete exclusion services to prevent future infestations, with pricing transparent from $900 to $2,500 depending on severity and property size.
localContext: Boerum Hill's mature trees along streets like State Street and Warren Place, combined with proximity to the Gowanus Canal area, create perfect squirrel habitats that often lead to attic and chimney invasions. The neighborhood's historic brownstones and row houses, many dating to the 1850s, feature architectural details like cornices and roof gaps that squirrels exploit for nesting, requiring specialized removal techniques that respect the area's landmark status.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Boerum Hill?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Boerum Hill typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the extent of the infestation, number of entry points, and the complexity of your property's architecture. Historic brownstones may require additional care during exclusion work, which factors into the final price. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Boerum Hill brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in Boerum Hill due to the neighborhood's abundant mature trees and historic building stock. Brownstones often have gaps in rooflines, deteriorated cornices, and unsealed chimneys that squirrels use to access attics and wall voids. The area's proximity to green spaces makes it particularly attractive to squirrel populations seeking shelter and nesting sites.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, legal squirrel removal methods in compliance with New York State wildlife regulations. We use live trapping and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter. We never use poisons or harmful techniques, and we ensure any young are safely removed with their mothers before sealing entry points.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Boerum Hill home?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Boerum Hill service calls within 24-48 hours for an initial inspection. The removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and entry points. After removal, we seal all entry points and provide exclusion services to prevent future invasions, with most projects completed within 1-2 weeks from initial contact.
